name: Feature request

---

## Problem or need

What workflow is not working well today?

## Proposed improvement

What would you like Cinderleaf to do differently?

## Why it helps

Explain the user benefit.

## Safety or workflow notes

If this touches installs, restore, archive, compare, or promotion behavior, describe the trust/safety expectations.
